case_title: MIDLAND FUNDING LLC VS. DIANNE WARREN ET AL

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF DECLARATION OF NON-SERVICE (TRANSACTION ID # 200003312) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JAN-07-2020 CONTINUED TO FEB-25-2020 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. ***NOTICE: IMPENDING DISCRETIONARY DISMISSAL PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE 68608(B).*** NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
SANCTION PAYMENT DEPOSITED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC AS TO DEFENDANT WARREN, DIANNE DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  NOV-18-2019
MINI MINUTES FOR JAN-07-2020 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 610
CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO ENTIRE ACTION BY COURT AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING FEB-25-2020 AT 10:30 AM. THIS DISMISSAL IS PURSUANT TO PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-25-2020 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Alisa Kim, Esq. appearing specially for Plaintiff. Court ordered case dismissed without prejudice at the request of Plaintiff. Judge: GARRETT L. WONG; Clerk: J. Rios Merida; Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-08-2020 Continued To Feb-25-20 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff's counsel is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order to Show Cause is re-set to Feb-25-2020 at 10:30 AM in Department 610. Court orders notice of Impending Discretionary Dismissal pursuant to Government Code 68608(b). Judge: GARRETT L. WONG; Clerk: J. Rios Merida; Proceedings not reported. (610)
